name: @hirobius/design-system
description: Hirobius Design Systems Architecture: token-governed React components, documentation surfaces, and distribution tooling.

scripts._comment:a11y-high-value: The following check:* validators are high-value accessibility checks that catch real violations (check:focus found 1 missing focus class). Kept dormant/manual-only to avoid pre-commit performance regression. Candidates to wire into pretest after CI stability review.
scripts._comment:link-integrity: check:doc-refs and check:routes both validate internal link integrity (different surfaces: doc refs vs route links). Kept dormant/manual-only to prevent pre-commit cascade.
scripts._comment:security-baseline: check:security validates OWASP baseline patterns. Dormant/manual-only — candidate for integration into security-focused CI lane, not pretest.
scripts._comment:token-integrity: check:css-values, check:token-structure validate token system correctness. Dormant/manual-only due to overlapping scope with check:fast and existing token validators.
scripts.build: pnpm sync:health && node scripts/sync-icons.mjs && vite build --configLoader native
scripts.build:prerender: pnpm build && pnpm build:ssr && node scripts/prerender.mjs
scripts.release: pnpm build:lib && pnpm smoke:consumer --skip-build && changeset publish
scripts.check:docs: node scripts/audit-component-integrity.mjs --docs && node scripts/check-frozen-demos.mjs && node scripts/check-token-descriptions.mjs --no-missing --quality
scripts.check:fast: node scripts/validate-manifest.mjs && node scripts/check-manifest-drift.mjs && node scripts/sync-asset-manifest.mjs && node scripts/build-tokens.mjs && node scripts/build-roadmap-data.mjs && node scripts/verify-tokens.mjs && node scripts/audit-tokens.mjs --full && pnpm typecheck && node scripts/check-css-integrity.mjs && node scripts/audit-component-integrity.mjs --tokens && pnpm check:docs && node scripts/check-ref-forwarding.mjs && node scripts/check-hardcoded-spacing.mjs && node scripts/check-dimensions.mjs && node scripts/check-hardcoded-breakpoints.mjs && node scripts/check-typography-discipline.mjs && pnpm exec editorconfig-checker && node scripts/check-mono-roles.mjs && node scripts/check-style-discipline.mjs --style-props-only && node scripts/check-tier-bypass.mjs && node scripts/check-link-integrity.mjs --doc-refs-only && node scripts/check-link-integrity.mjs --route-links-only && node scripts/check-legacy-hds-vars.mjs && node scripts/check-brand.mjs && node scripts/check-registry.mjs && node scripts/check-asset-manifest.mjs && node scripts/check-template-source-of-truth.mjs
scripts.check:full: node scripts/validate-manifest.mjs && node scripts/check-manifest-drift.mjs && node scripts/sync-asset-manifest.mjs && node scripts/build-tokens.mjs && node scripts/verify-tokens.mjs && node scripts/audit-tokens.mjs --full && pnpm typecheck && node scripts/check-css-integrity.mjs && node scripts/audit-component-integrity.mjs --tokens && node scripts/audit-pages.mjs && pnpm check:docs && node scripts/check-doc-structure.mjs && node scripts/check-contrast.mjs && node scripts/check-focus-states.mjs && node scripts/check-reduced-motion.mjs && node scripts/check-ref-forwarding.mjs && node scripts/check-hardcoded-spacing.mjs && node scripts/check-dimensions.mjs && node scripts/check-hardcoded-breakpoints.mjs && node scripts/check-unresponsive-grids.mjs && node scripts/check-page-shell.mjs && node scripts/check-motion.mjs && node scripts/check-typography-discipline.mjs && pnpm exec editorconfig-checker && node scripts/check-mono-roles.mjs && node scripts/check-style-discipline.mjs && node scripts/check-hardcoded-colors.mjs && node scripts/check-tier-bypass.mjs && node scripts/check-token-structure.mjs && node scripts/check-link-integrity.mjs && node scripts/check-og-meta.mjs && node scripts/check-asset-manifest.mjs && node scripts/check-security-baseline.mjs && node scripts/check-attributions.mjs && node scripts/check-exemptions.mjs && node scripts/check-legacy-hds-vars.mjs && node scripts/check-brand.mjs && node scripts/check-registry.mjs && node scripts/audit-component-integrity.mjs --api && node scripts/check-token-descriptions.mjs --no-missing && node scripts/check-token-renames.mjs
scripts.check:lockfile: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile --offline --prefer-offline --ignore-scripts --silent 2>/dev/null || (echo 'Lockfile drift: run pnpm install' && exit 1)
scripts.check:release: pnpm check:full && node scripts/check-style-discipline.mjs && pnpm build && node scripts/check-route-smoke.mjs && pnpm perf:budget && pnpm test:a11y && pnpm test:visual && pnpm test:responsive && pnpm test:collision && pnpm check:size
scripts.check:tokens: node scripts/check-hardcoded-colors.mjs && pnpm lint --rule '{"tailwindcss/no-custom-classname":"error"}' && node scripts/audit-tokens.mjs --forbidden && node scripts/check-tier-bypass.mjs && node scripts/check-hardcoded-spacing.mjs && node scripts/check-typography-discipline.mjs --fonts-only
scripts.dev: node scripts/generate-manifest.mjs && node scripts/sync-asset-manifest.mjs && node scripts/generate-component-api.mjs && node scripts/sync-icons.mjs && node scripts/build-tokens.mjs && node scripts/build-roadmap-data.mjs && vite --configLoader native
scripts.manifest:generate: node scripts/generate-manifest.mjs && node scripts/generate-component-api.mjs && node scripts/enrich-manifest.mjs
scripts.perf:budget: node -e "require('fs').readdirSync('.lighthouseci').filter(f=>f.startsWith('lhr-')).forEach(f=>require('fs').unlinkSync('.lighthouseci/'+f))" 2>/dev/null; lhci collect --config=.lighthouserc.json && lhci assert --config=.lighthouserc.json; find . -maxdepth 1 -type d -name 'C:*' -exec rm -rf {} + 2>/dev/null; true
scripts.pretest: node scripts/validate-manifest.mjs && node scripts/check-manifest-drift.mjs && node scripts/check-manifest-schema-semver.mjs && node scripts/audit-component-integrity.mjs --completeness && node scripts/check-source-canon.mjs && node scripts/check-binding-drift.mjs && node scripts/test-figma-masters-snapshot.mjs && node scripts/test-doc-pages-snapshot.mjs && node scripts/check-registry.mjs && node scripts/check-tenant-tokens.mjs && knip --no-exit-code
scripts.sync: node scripts/build-tokens.mjs && node scripts/audit-tokens.mjs --forbidden && node scripts/build-handoff.mjs && node scripts/build-design-md.mjs && node scripts/build-figma-variables.mjs
scripts.sync:health: node scripts/generate-manifest.mjs && node scripts/generate-component-api.mjs && node scripts/enrich-manifest.mjs && node scripts/sync-asset-manifest.mjs && node scripts/build-tokens.mjs && node scripts/audit-tokens.mjs --report-only && node scripts/build-design-md.mjs && node scripts/sync-system-health.mjs && node scripts/build-roadmap-data.mjs && node scripts/verify-roadmap-sync.mjs
scripts.tokens: node scripts/generate-manifest.mjs && node scripts/build-tokens.mjs && node scripts/audit-tokens.mjs --forbidden && node scripts/check-typography-discipline.mjs --overrides-only && node scripts/sync-hds-registry.mjs && node scripts/build-handoff.mjs && node scripts/build-design-md.mjs && node scripts/generate-llms-txt.mjs
scripts.watch:metrics: nodemon --watch src/app/components --watch src/app/pages --watch src/app/design-system --watch src/app/styles -e tsx,ts,css --exec "node scripts/audit-tokens.mjs --full && node scripts/generate-manifest.mjs"
